  position: relative;
}

.ProseMirror {
  word-wrap: break-word;
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  white-space: break-spaces;
  -webkit-font-variant-ligatures: none;
  font-variant-ligatures: none;
  font-feature-settings: "liga" 0; /* the above doesn't seem to work in Edge */
}

.ProseMirror [contenteditable="false"] {
  white-space: normal;
}

.ProseMirror [contenteditable="false"] [contenteditable="true"] {
  white-space: pre-wrap;
}

.ProseMirror pre {
  white-space: pre-wrap;
}

img.ProseMirror-separator {
  display: inline !important;
  border: none !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  width: 0 !important;
  height: 0 !important;
}

.ProseMirror-gapcursor {
  display: none;
  pointer-events: none;
  position: absolute;
  margin: 0;
}

.ProseMirror-gapcursor:after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  top: -2px;
  width: 20px;
  border-top: 1px solid black;
  animation: ProseMirror-cursor-blink 1.1s steps(2, start) infinite;
}

@keyframes ProseMirror-cursor-blink {
  to {
    visibility: hidden;
  }
}

.ProseMirror-hideselection *::selection {
  background: transparent;
}

.ProseMirror-hideselection *::-moz-selection {
  background: transparent;
}

.ProseMirror-hideselection * {
  caret-color: transparent;
}

.ProseMirror-focused .ProseMirror-gapcursor {
  display: block;
}</style></head><body class="bg-bg-100 text-text-100 font-ui min-h-screen chat-ui-core" style="pointer-events: auto;"><div id="root"><div class="cds-root text-primary contents" transform: none;"><div class="flex flex-row gap-2 relative"><div class="flex-1"><div data-testid="user-message" class="font-large !font-user-message py-0.5 grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 relative [&amp;_ul]:!space-y-0 [&amp;_ol]:!space-y-0 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8" style="max-height: 200px; overflow: hidden; position: relative;"><p class="whitespace-pre-wrap break-words">Prompt Master Grupo Scaini v1.0
Dashboard Executivo Grupo Scaini Business Intelligence Comercial, Financeiro e Operacional
Visão Geral
Plataforma de BI para o Grupo Scaini com integração Google Sheets, Supabase, dashboards executivos, metas, devoluções e análises consolidadas.
Empresas
WWS (Içara), ELS (Laguna), MIRS (São José), SCAINI Osório (Osório/RS), VSJOI (Joinville).
Metas
Metas em toneladas por representante. Metas proporcionais por dias úteis. Consolidação por empresa e grupo.
Integração
Importação automática de todas as abas da planilha Google Sheets e atualização periódica.
Indicadores
Receita, toneladas, margem, devoluções, receita/tonelada, margem/tonelada, ticket médio e rankings.
Dashboards
Executivo, Empresas, Representantes, Clientes, Produtos, Metas, Devoluções e DRE.
Calendário 2026
Dias úteis calculados por empresa com feriados corporativos específicos informados.
Segurança
Perfis: Administrador, Diretoria, Gerente, Representante e Leitor.
IA e Insights
Resumo executivo, alertas, tendências, clientes em risco e desempenho comercial.
Identidade Visual
Logo oficial Grupo Scaini, tema claro/escuro e visual corporativo.</p><div class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-12 bg-gradient-to-t from-bg-300 to-transparent pointer-events-none"></div></div><button class="pb-3 pt-1 text-xs text-text-500/80 hover:text-text-100 transition w-3/4 text-left rounded-lg">Mostrar mais</button></div></div></div><div class="flex justify-start opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-within:opacity-100 pointer-coarse:opacity-100 transition" role="group" aria-label="Message actions"><div class="text-text-300"><div class="text-text-300 flex items-stretch justify-between"><span class="text-text-500 text-xs flex items-center mr-2" id="base-ui-_r_96_">15 de jun.</span><div class="flex items-center"><button type="button" data-cds="Button" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus text-primary aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 !text-muted hover:!text-primary" aria-label="Tentar novamente" id="base-ui-_r_98_"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish "></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 "><span data-cds="Icon" aria-hidden="true" style="font-family: var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable); <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Para eu te ajudar da melhor forma, me conta: o que você quer fazer com esse prompt agora?</p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Refinar/expandir o texto do prompt (para usar em outra ferramenta de IA, tipo Lovable, v0, Bolt etc.)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Criar um protótipo visual do dashboard (ex: tela executiva interativa)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Estruturar a arquitetura técnica (Google Sheets → Supabase → dashboard)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Outra coisa específica</li>
</ul></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="flex justify-start opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-within:opacity-100 pointer-coarse:opacity-100 transition" role="group" aria-label="Message actions"><div class="text-text-300"><div class="text-text-300 flex items-stretch justify-between"><button type="button" data-cds="Button" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus text-primary aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 !text-muted hover:!text-primary" aria-label="Copiar" data-testid="action-bar-copy" id="base-ui-_r_9e_"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish "></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 "><span class="relative"><span data-cds="Icon" class="transition-all opacity-100 scale-100" aria-hidden="true" style="font-family: var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable); transform: none;"><div class="flex flex-row gap-2 relative"><div class="flex-1"><div data-testid="user-message" class="font-large !font-user-message py-0.5 grid grid-cols-1 gap-2 relative [&amp;_ul]:!space-y-0 [&amp;_ol]:!space-y-0 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8" style="max-height: 200px; overflow: hidden; position: relative;"><p class="whitespace-pre-wrap break-words"># DIRETRIZ DE UX E DESIGN
Manter o padrão visual e experiência de usuário do Lovable.
O sistema deve utilizar:
- Sidebar lateral recolhível
- Header superior com filtros globais
- Cards KPI na primeira linha
- Gráficos interativos na área central
- Tabelas analíticas detalhadas na parte inferior
- Layout responsivo
- Tema claro e escuro
- Navegação simples e intuitiva
Inspirar-se na estrutura visual padrão gerada pelo Lovable.
Não criar layouts excessivamente técnicos ou complexos.
Priorizar:
- Experiência executiva
- Facilidade de análise
- Visual limpo
- Poucos cliques para acessar informações
- Performance
Utilizar componentes semelhantes aos gerados pelo Lovable:
- KPI Cards
- Data Tables
- Charts
- Filters
- Dialogs
- Drawers
- Tabs
- Dashboards
O resultado final deve parecer uma evolução profissional de um projeto criado no Lovable e não um sistema ERP tradicional.</p><div class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-12 bg-gradient-to-t from-bg-300 to-transparent pointer-events-none"></div></div><button class="pb-3 pt-1 text-xs text-text-500/80 hover:text-text-100 transition w-3/4 text-left rounded-lg">Mostrar mais</button></div></div></div><div class="flex justify-start opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-within:opacity-100 pointer-coarse:opacity-100 transition" role="group" aria-label="Message actions"><div class="text-text-300"><div class="text-text-300 flex items-stretch justify-between"><span class="text-text-500 text-xs flex items-center mr-2" id="base-ui-_r_9o_">15 de jun.</span><div class="flex items-center"><button type="button" data-cds="Button" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus text-primary aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 !text-muted hover:!text-primary" aria-label="Tentar novamente" id="base-ui-_r_9q_"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish "></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 "><span data-cds="Icon" aria-hidden="true" style="font-family: var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable); opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 data-find-omitted="" class="sr-only select-none">Claude respondeu: Perfeito, isso já dá uma direção visual bem clara — estilo "Lovable" com sidebar, KPIs no topo, gráficos centrais e tabelas analíticas, tema claro/escuro, foco…</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Reconheceu padrão iterativo e deliberou próximos passos</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Reconheceu padrão iterativo e deliberou próximos passos</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Perfeito, isso já dá uma direção visual bem clara — estilo "Lovable" com sidebar, KPIs no topo, gráficos centrais e tabelas analíticas, tema claro/escuro, foco executivo e poucos cliques.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Agora me diz: você ainda tem mais partes desse prompt master para compartilhar (ex: estrutura de dados, telas específicas, regras de cálculo de metas etc.), ou já posso começar a trabalhar com o que você passou até aqui?</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Se for para começar, o ideal seria eu criar um protótipo interativo (HTML/React) do dashboard executivo com esse layout, usando dados de exemplo do Grupo Scaini — assim você visualiza o resultado e a gente ajusta antes de detalhar a integração com Google Sheets/Supabase.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Piloto pronto. Ele já segue a diretriz: sidebar recolhível com as 8 seções (Executivo, Empresas, Representantes, Clientes, Produtos, Metas, Devoluções, DRE), header com filtro global por empresa e período, alterna tema claro/escuro, e traz dados mockados das 5 empresas (WWS, ELS, MIRS, Scaini Osório, VSJOI).</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">O que já está funcional:</p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">KPIs (receita, toneladas, margem, devoluções, receita/ton, margem/ton, ticket médio, meta consolidada)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Gráfico de receita por empresa + anéis de progresso de meta</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Linha de evolução receita x meta (Jan-Dez)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Painel "Resumo Executivo · IA" com insights/alertas</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Ranking de representantes com barra de % meta</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Mix de produtos (donut)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Filtro de empresa atualiza KPIs, gráficos e tabela em tempo real</li>
</ul>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Próximos passos possíveis: telas das demais seções (Empresas, DRE etc.), integração real com Google Sheets/Supabase, calendário de dias úteis 2026, e perfis de acesso. Quer que eu siga por algum desses?</p></div></div><div class="flex flex-col gap-2 py-2"><div class="group/artifact-block relative flex text-left font-ui rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-0.5 opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 data-find-omitted="" class="sr-only select-none">Claude respondeu: Versão HTML autônoma pronta, com tela de login antes do dashboard.</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Editou 4 arquivos, criou um arquivo, leu um arquivo</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Editou 4 arquivos, criou um arquivo, leu um arquivo</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Versão HTML autônoma pronta, com tela de login antes do dashboard.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Tela de login: usuário, senha (com botão mostrar/ocultar) e seletor de perfil (Administrador, Diretoria, Gerente, Representante, Leitor). Qualquer usuário/senha preenchidos liberam o acesso — é um protótipo, sem backend de autenticação real.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Após login: a navegação lateral se adapta ao perfil escolhido — por exemplo, "Representante" e "Leitor" não veem Empresas, Produtos e DRE; só "Administrador" e "Diretoria" veem DRE.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">O dashboard mantém tudo da versão anterior (KPIs, gráficos com Chart.js, anéis de meta, ranking de representantes, mix de produtos, tema claro/escuro, sidebar recolhível, filtro global por empresa) em um único arquivo HTML — basta abrir no navegador.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Próximo passo natural seria conectar esse login a uma autenticação real (Supabase Auth, por exemplo) e ligar os dados ao Google Sheets/Supabase em vez dos dados mockados. Quer que eu já estruture essa integração?</p></div></div><div class="flex flex-col gap-2 py-2"><div class="group/artifact-block relative flex text-left font-ui rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-0.5 transition duration-300 w-full hover:bg-bg-000/50 px-4 border-border-300 hover:border-border-200"><button type="button" class="absolute inset-0 cursor-pointer rounded-[inherit] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Consegui acessar a planilha. É um relatório de <strong>Notas Fiscais Emitidas por Período</strong> (export direto do ERP), não uma base "limpa". Estrutura que identifiquei na aba que você enviou (gid=343416253):</p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Linhas 1–18: cabeçalho do relatório (filtros, parâmetros) — não são dados</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Linha 17: marca o início de um bloco por empresa, ex: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">001 - WWS COMERCIO DE FERRAGENS LTDA. - Nº Reg: 4074</code></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Linha 18: cabeçalhos reais das colunas — entre eles: <strong>EMISSÃO</strong> (data, dd/mm/aaaa), <strong>CLIENTE</strong>, <strong>REPRESENTANTE</strong>, <strong>PESO LÍQ.</strong> (kg) e <strong>TOTAL LÍQ.</strong> (R$)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Linha 19+: uma linha por nota fiscal</li>
</ul>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Para montar receita, toneladas, ranking de representantes e — com isso — os filtros de mês/trimestre/ano que você pediu, dá pra usar <strong>EMISSÃO</strong> (data), <strong>TOTAL LÍQ.</strong> (receita) e <strong>PESO LÍQ.</strong> (peso, convertendo kg→ton).</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">No rodapé da página apareceram nomes que parecem ser outras abas da planilha: PERÍODO, DEVOLUÇÕES, VENDEDORES, WWS, ELS, MIRS, OSÓRIO, VSJOI, CURVA ABC.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Antes de programar a integração, preciso confirmar 3 pontos:</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"></div></div></div></div><div class="flex justify-start opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-within:opacity-100 pointer-coarse:opacity-100 transition" role="group" aria-label="Message actions"><div class="text-text-300"><div class="text-text-300 flex items-stretch justify-between"><button type="button" data-cds="Button" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus text-primary aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 !text-muted hover:!text-primary" aria-label="Copiar" data-testid="action-bar-copy" id="base-ui-_r_dc_"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish "></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 "><span class="relative"><span data-cds="Icon" class="transition-all opacity-100 scale-100" aria-hidden="true" style="font-family: var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable); Ela já está acessível publicamente (qualquer pessoa com o link pode visualizar)?
R: A planilha já está com compartilhamento "Qualquer pessoa com o link - Leitor"</p><p class="whitespace-pre-wrap break-words">P: As 5 empresas do grupo estão em abas separadas ou todas dentro desta mesma aba (em blocos por empresa)?
R: Cada empresa tem sua própria aba (WWS, ELS, MIRS, OSÓRIO, VSJOI)</p><p class="whitespace-pre-wrap break-words">P: Margem e Devoluções (que aparecem no dashboard) existem em alguma outra aba da planilha?

class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Deixa eu primeiro ler a estrutura real dessa aba para mapear todas as colunas antes de programar.</p></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Não consigo acessar a planilha diretamente pela minha ferramenta de busca — ela requer que a URL já tenha aparecido em uma pesquisa prévia.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Mas com o que você descreveu, já tenho o suficiente. Me confirma mais algumas colunas da linha 18 da aba <strong>PERÍODO</strong>:</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Você mencionou:</p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Coluna A</strong> → EMP. (número da empresa)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Coluna B</strong> → N.F. (número da nota fiscal)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Coluna C</strong> → SER. (série)</li>
</ul>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Preciso saber o nome exato das colunas seguintes, especificamente:</p>
<ol class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-decimal flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Qual coluna tem a <strong>data de emissão</strong>? (ex: EMISSÃO, DATA, DT.EMIS.)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Qual coluna tem o <strong>cliente</strong>? (ex: CLIENTE, RAZÃO SOCIAL, NOME)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Qual coluna tem o <strong>representante</strong>? (ex: REP., VENDEDOR, REPRESENTANTE)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Qual coluna tem o <strong>peso/toneladas</strong>? (ex: PESO LÍQ., KG, TON.)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Qual coluna tem o <strong>valor total</strong>? (ex: TOTAL LÍQ., VLR.TOTAL, RECEITA)</li>
</ol>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Você pode abrir a planilha na linha 18 e me copiar os nomes de todas as colunas (da A até o final) aqui? Pode colar como texto simples — por exemplo:</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">EMP. | N.F. | SER. | EMISSÃO | CLIENTE | REP. | PESO LÍQ. | TOTAL LÍQ.</code></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Com isso mapeio tudo certinho e já gero o dashboard lendo exatamente a estrutura real da sua planilha.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="flex justify-start opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-within:opacity-100 pointer-coarse:opacity-100 transition" role="group" aria-label="Message actions"><div class="text-text-300"><div class="text-text-300 flex items-stretch justify-between"><button type="button" data-cds="Button" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus text-primary aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 !text-muted hover:!text-primary" aria-label="Copiar" data-testid="action-bar-copy" id="base-ui-_r_eg_"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish "></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 "><span class="relative"><span data-cds="Icon" class="transition-all opacity-100 scale-100" aria-hidden="true" style="font-family: var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable); opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 data-find-omitted="" class="sr-only select-none">Claude respondeu: Perfeito!</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Perfeito! Cola aqui o conteúdo exatamente como está na planilha — pode ser um print, ou o texto copiado das células da linha 18 em diante (algumas linhas de exemplo também ajudam).</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Assim consigo ver:</p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Como as 3 informações (EMP., N.F., SER.) estão agrupadas na coluna A — se estão numa célula só separadas por <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">/</code> ou <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">-</code>, ou se é uma célula mesclada</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">O nome exato de todas as outras colunas</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Um exemplo de dado real para garantir que o parser vai funcionar corretamente</li>
</ul>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Cola como quiser — texto, print ou até uma descrição linha a linha.</p></div></div></div></div></div><div class="flex justify-start opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-within:opacity-100 pointer-coarse:opacity-100 transition" role="group" aria-label="Message actions"><div class="text-text-300"><div class="text-text-300 flex items-stretch justify-between"><button type="button" data-cds="Button" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus text-primary aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 !text-muted hover:!text-primary" aria-label="Copiar" data-testid="action-bar-copy" id="base-ui-_r_f2_"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish "></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 "><span class="relative"><span data-cds="Icon" class="transition-all opacity-100 scale-100" aria-hidden="true" style="font-family: var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable); Agora todos os botões laterais funcionam corretamente. O que foi corrigido:</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>Problema raiz:</strong> os botões do menu apenas trocavam a variável <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">activeNav</code> mas não renderizavam nenhum conteúdo novo — o <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">onclick</code> estava incompleto.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>O que foi resolvido:</strong></p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Cada botão do menu agora chama <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">renderPage()</code>, que decide qual seção exibir</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Executivo</strong> → KPIs, gráficos de receita, evolução, representantes, clientes, UF</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Empresas</strong> → KPIs por empresa, evolução mensal comparativa, tabela com todas as métricas</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Representantes</strong> → tabela completa + gráfico de barras horizontal + pizza por empresa</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Clientes</strong> → ranking completo + gráfico top 10 + distribuição por UF</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Metas / Devoluções / DRE</strong> → tela informativa aguardando a aba correspondente na planilha</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Os filtros (empresa, ano, trimestre, mês, UF) agora recarregam a página ativa corretamente</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">O botão <strong>Recarregar</strong> recarrega os dados da planilha e volta para a página atual</li>
</ul></div></div><div class="flex flex-col gap-2 py-2"><div class="group/artifact-block relative flex text-left font-ui rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-0.5 transition duration-300 w-full overflow: hidden; position: relative;"><p class="whitespace-pre-wrap break-words">Preciso que faça a vinculação das informações da coluna P na aba período com a aba vendedores (coluna B) e mostre o nome do vendedor apresentado na aba vendedores na coluna E</p></div></div></div></div><div class="flex justify-start opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-within:opacity-100 pointer-coarse:opacity-100 transition" role="group" aria-label="Message actions"><div class="text-text-300"><div class="text-text-300 flex items-stretch justify-between"><span class="text-text-500 text-xs flex items-center mr-2" id="base-ui-_r_gk_">17 de jun.</span><div class="flex items-center"><button type="button" data-cds="Button" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus text-primary aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 !text-muted hover:!text-primary" aria-label="Tentar novamente" id="base-ui-_r_gm_"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish "></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 "><span data-cds="Icon" aria-hidden="true" style="font-family: var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable); opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 data-find-omitted="" class="sr-only select-none">Claude respondeu: Antes de programar, preciso ver a estrutura real das duas abas.</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Antes de programar, preciso ver a estrutura real das duas abas. Me passa o <strong>gid</strong> da aba <strong>VENDEDORES</strong> — é o número que aparece após <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">gid=</code> na URL quando você clica nessa aba na planilha.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Enquanto isso, já entendi a lógica:</p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Aba PERÍODO · Coluna P</strong> → código do representante (ex: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">001</code>, <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">015</code>...)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Aba VENDEDORES · Coluna B</strong> → mesmo código (chave de ligação)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Aba VENDEDORES · Coluna E</strong> → nome completo do vendedor</li>
</ul>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Com o gid da aba VENDEDORES eu leio as duas abas, monto o dicionário <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">código → nome</code> e substituo o código em todas as linhas da aba PERÍODO antes de calcular os rankings — assim o nome real aparece em todo o dashboard automaticamente.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Cola o gid aqui que já faço a integração.</p></div></div></div></div></div><div class="flex justify-start opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-within:opacity-100 pointer-coarse:opacity-100 transition" role="group" aria-label="Message actions"><div class="text-text-300"><div class="text-text-300 flex items-stretch justify-between"><button type="button" data-cds="Button" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus text-primary aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 !text-muted hover:!text-primary" aria-label="Copiar" data-testid="action-bar-copy" id="base-ui-_r_gs_"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish "></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 "><span class="relative"><span data-cds="Icon" class="transition-all opacity-100 scale-100" aria-hidden="true" style="font-family: var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable); Já tenho a tabela completa de vendedores. Vou montar o dicionário diretamente no código — o código antes do hífen (ex: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">044</code>, <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">119</code>) é a chave que bate com a coluna P da aba PERÍODO, e o nome após o tab é o nome a exibir.</p></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Visualizou 2 arquivos, executou 2 comandos, editou um arquivo</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Visualizou 2 arquivos, executou 2 comandos, editou um arquivo</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Agora atualizo o parser para usar <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">resolveVendedor</code> na coluna REP:</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Visualizou 2 arquivos, executou um comando, editou um arquivo</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Visualizou 2 arquivos, executou um comando, editou um arquivo</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Feito! A vinculação está funcionando assim:</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>Fluxo:</strong> coluna P da aba PERÍODO (ex: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">020-MIRS - ROGERIO ROSA</code>) → extrai o código <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">020</code> → busca no dicionário → exibe <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Rogério Rosa</code> em todo o dashboard.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Todos os 55 vendedores que você passou estão mapeados. Em qualquer lugar que aparecia o código bruto do ERP (ranking de representantes, tabela de empresas, insights) agora vai exibir o nome real.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Se algum código aparecer na planilha e não estiver no dicionário, o sistema usa o texto depois do hífen como fallback — então nunca fica em branco. Quando você adicionar novos vendedores, é só me passar a linha da aba VENDEDORES que incluo no mapa.</p></div></div><div class="flex flex-col gap-2 py-2"><div class="group/artifact-block relative flex opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 data-find-omitted="" class="sr-only select-none">Claude respondeu: Vamos debugar.</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Vamos debugar. O problema provavelmente é na leitura do CSV — o cabeçalho não está sendo encontrado, ou os índices das colunas estão errados. Preciso ver o que a planilha retorna de verdade.</p></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Fetch first 30 rows of the PERÍODO sheet to inspect real structure</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Fetch first 30 rows of the PERÍODO sheet to inspect real structure</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">A rede do servidor não permite acesso externo. Vou adicionar um <strong>painel de diagnóstico</strong> diretamente no dashboard — assim ele mostra exatamente o que está lendo da planilha e onde trava.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Visualizou um arquivo, editou um arquivo, leu um arquivo</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Visualizou um arquivo, editou um arquivo, leu um arquivo</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Atualizei o arquivo. Agora ao fazer login e carregar, vai aparecer um <strong>painel de diagnóstico</strong> no topo do dashboard mostrando:</p>
<ol class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-decimal flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Quantas linhas</strong> o CSV retornou</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Linha 1 a 25</strong> — conteúdo das colunas A e P para localizar o cabeçalho</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Qual linha</strong> o cabeçalho foi encontrado</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Nomes de todas as colunas</strong> detectadas com seus índices</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Quantos registros</strong> foram lidos, ignorados por data e por receita zero</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Amostra</strong> do valor real de REPRESENTANTE e TOTAL LÍQ. na primeira linha de dados</li>
</ol>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Me manda um print ou cola o texto que aparecer no painel — com isso identifico exatamente onde está travando e corrijo de vez.</p></div></div><div class="flex flex-col gap-2 py-2"><div class="group/artifact-block relative flex text-left font-ui rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-0.5 transition duration-300 w-full Vou corrigir o <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">EMP_MAP</code> e o <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">parseEmpNFSer</code> para aceitar ambos os correta — ele popula com os nomes que vêm dos dados. O problema real é que <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">empInfo</code> não estava resolvendo os códigos <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">01</code>, <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">02</code> corretamente, então todos os registros ficavam como "Desconhecida" e o filtro ficava vazio ou errado.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Agora vou adicionar também um log no diagnóstico para mostrar a amostra do campo EMPNFSER real:</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Executou um comando, leu um arquivo</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Executou um comando, leu um arquivo</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Arquivo atualizado. O que foi corrigido:</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>Problema principal:</strong> o código da empresa na planilha vem como <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">01</code>, <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">02</code>, <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">03</code>... mas o mapa interno só tinha <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">001</code>, <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">002</code>, <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">003</code> — então nenhuma empresa era reconhecida e o filtro ficava vazio.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>Correções aplicadas:</strong></p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">EMP_MAP</code> agora aceita <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">1</code>, <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">01</code> e <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">001</code> para cada empresa</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">parseEmpNFSer</code> agora lida com formato <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">01/000123/1</code> (barra) e <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">01 - WWS</code> (hífen)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">empInfo</code> tenta todas as variações de padding antes de retornar desconhecida</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">O diagnóstico agora mostra exatamente como cada linha está sendo interpretada</li>
</ul>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Ao abrir o dashboard, o painel de diagnóstico vai mostrar linha a linha a resolução do código para o nome da empresa. Me manda o que aparecer se ainda não funcionar.</p></div></div><div class="flex flex-col gap-2 py-2"><div class="group/artifact-block relative flex text-left font-ui rounded-lg overflow-hidden opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 data-find-omitted="" class="sr-only select-none">Claude respondeu: O diagnóstico não apareceu — isso significa que o CSV nem chegou a ser processado, provavelmente a planilha não está sendo lida.</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">O diagnóstico não apareceu — isso significa que o CSV nem chegou a ser processado, provavelmente a planilha não está sendo lida. O problema mais comum é que a planilha precisa estar <strong>publicada na web</strong> (diferente de apenas compartilhada com link).</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Preciso que você faça isso na planilha:</p>
<ol class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-decimal flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Abra a planilha no Google Sheets</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Menu <strong>Arquivo → Compartilhar → Publicar na web</strong></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Em "Link", selecione a aba <strong>PERÍODO</strong></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Clique em <strong>Publicar</strong> e confirme</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Copie a URL que aparecer e cole aqui</li>
</ol>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Enquanto isso, vou adicionar um teste de conexão que mostra exatamente o que está acontecendo antes mesmo de processar:</p></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Executou 2 comandos, visualizou um arquivo, leu um arquivo</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Executou 2 comandos, visualizou um arquivo, leu um arquivo</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Baixe e abra este arquivo. Agora o dashboard vai mostrar exatamente o que está acontecendo com a conexão.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>O que provavelmente está acontecendo:</strong> a planilha está apenas <em>compartilhada com link</em> (qualquer pessoa pode visualizar), mas não <em>publicada na web</em> — são coisas diferentes no Google Sheets. O acesso via CSV no navegador exige a publicação.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>Para publicar:</strong></p>
<ol class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-decimal flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Abra a planilha</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Arquivo → Compartilhar → Publicar na web</strong></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">No primeiro dropdown selecione <strong>PERÍODO</strong></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">No segundo mantenha <strong>Valores separados por vírgula (.csv)</strong></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Clique <strong>Publicar</strong> e confirme com OK</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Recarregue o dashboard e clique no botão de atualizar (ícone ↺)</li>
</ol>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Se aparecer mensagem de erro no dashboard, me manda um print que corrijo na hora.</p></div></div><div class="flex flex-col gap-2 py-2"><div class="group/artifact-block relative flex text-left font-ui rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-0.5 transition duration-300 w-full hover:bg-bg-000/50 px-4 border-border-300 Vou também remover o painel de diagnóstico (que já cumpriu seu papel) e deixar o dashboard limpo:</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Executou um comando, leu um arquivo</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Executou um comando, leu um arquivo</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Pronto! Baixe e abra o arquivo. Agora ele usa diretamente a URL publicada que você gerou — sem dependência de gid ou configuração extra.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Ao abrir e fazer login, o dashboard vai buscar o CSV nessa URL e popular todos os filtros e gráficos automaticamente. Se ainda aparecer vazio, me manda um print da tela que aparece — pode ser que a aba publicada não seja o PERÍODO (o Google publica a primeira aba por padrão). Nesse caso precisamos ajustar qual aba está sendo publicada.</p></div></div><div class="flex flex-col gap-2 py-2"><div class="group/artifact-block relative flex text-left font-ui rounded-lg opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 data-find-omitted="" class="sr-only select-none">Claude respondeu: O erro é "Failed to fetch" — o navegador está bloqueando a requisição por política de segurança (CORS).</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">O erro é <strong>"Failed to fetch"</strong> — o navegador está bloqueando a requisição por política de segurança (CORS). Isso acontece porque o arquivo HTML está sendo aberto localmente (<code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">file://</code>) e o navegador bloqueia chamadas externas nesse modo.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">A solução é usar o <strong>Google Apps Script</strong> como proxy — ele serve o CSV sem restrições de CORS. Vou reescrever a conexão usando essa abordagem:</p></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Rewrite loadData to use Google Visualization API which bypasses CORS when opening locally</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Rewrite loadData to use Google Visualization API which bypasses CORS when opening locally</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Agora vou também adicionar um botão de <strong>copiar comando Python</strong> para facilitar:</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Presented file</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Presented file</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Baixe o arquivo atualizado. O problema é estrutural — o navegador bloqueia chamadas externas quando o HTML é aberto direto do computador (<code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">file://</code>). Há 3 formas de resolver, da mais simples para a mais robusta:</p>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>Opção 1 — Python (mais simples, sem instalar nada)</strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Se tiver Python instalado (Windows/Mac/Linux), na pasta onde salvou o arquivo abra o terminal e execute:</p>
<div role="group" aria-label="Código" tabindex="0" class="relative group/copy bg-bg-000/50 border-0.5 border-border-400 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-accent-100"><div class="sticky opacity-0 group-hover/copy:opacity-100 group-focus-within/copy:opacity-100 top-2 py-2 h-12 w-0 float-right"><div class="absolute right-0 h-8 px-2 items-center inline-flex z-10"><button class="inline-flex

          font-base
          duration-300
          ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-8 w-8 rounded-md backdrop-blur-md _fill_10ocf_9 _ghost_10ocf_96" type="button" aria-label="Copiar para a área de transferência" data-state="closed"><div class="relative"><div class="transition-all opacity-100 scale-100" style="width: 20px; height: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="transition-all opacity-100 scale-100" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M12.5 3A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 14 4.5V6h1.5A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 17 7.5v8a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5 1.5h-8A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 6 15.5V14H4.5A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 3 12.5v-8A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 4.5 3zm1.5 9.5a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5 1.5H7v1.5a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5h8a.5.5 0 0 0 .5-.5v-8a.5.5 0 0 0-.5-.5H14zM4.5 4a.5.5 0 0 0-.5.5v8a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5h8a.5.5 0 0 0 .5-.5v-8a.5.5 0 0 0-.5-.5z"></path></svg></div><div class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center"><div class="transition-all opacity-0 scale-50" style="width: 20px; height: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="transition-all opacity-0 scale-50" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M15.188 5.11a.5.5 0 0 1 .752.626l-.056.084-7.5 9a.5.5 0 0 1-.738.033l-3.5-3.5-.064-.078a.501.501 0 0 1 .693-.693l.078.064 3.113 3.113 7.15-8.58z"></path></svg></div></div></div></button></div></div><div class="overflow-x-auto"><pre class="code-block__code !my-0 !rounded-lg !text-sm !leading-relaxed p-3.5" style="color: rgb(20, 24, 31); background: transparent; font-family: var(--font-mono);"><code style="color: rgb(20, 24, 31); background: transparent; font-family: var(--font-mono); white-space: pre-wrap;"><span><span>python3 -m http.server 8080</span></span></code></pre></div></div>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Depois acesse <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">http://localhost:8080/dashboard-grupo-scaini-sheets.html</code> no navegador. Funciona imediatamente.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>Opção 2 — VS Code</strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Instale a extensão <strong>Live Server</strong> (gratuita), clique com botão direito no arquivo e escolha "Open with Live Server".</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>Opção 3 — Chrome sem segurança (só para testes)</strong></p>
<div role="group" aria-label="Código" tabindex="0" class="relative group/copy bg-bg-000/50 border-0.5 border-border-400 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-accent-100"><div class="sticky opacity-0 group-hover/copy:opacity-100 group-focus-within/copy:opacity-100 top-2 py-2 h-12 w-0 float-right"><div class="absolute right-0 h-8 px-2 items-center inline-flex z-10"><button class="inline-flex

Siga o passo a passo abaixo:</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>1. Verifique se o Python está instalado</strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Abra o <strong>Prompt de Comando</strong> (Windows) ou <strong>Terminal</strong> (Mac/Linux) e digite:</p>
<div role="group" aria-label="Código" tabindex="0" class="relative group/copy bg-bg-000/50 border-0.5 border-border-400 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-accent-100"><div class="sticky opacity-0 group-hover/copy:opacity-100 group-focus-within/copy:opacity-100 top-2 py-2 h-12 w-0 float-right"><div class="absolute right-0 h-8 px-2 items-center inline-flex z-10"><button class="inline-flex
