<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Se aparecer a versão (ex: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Python 3.11.2</code>), está instalado. Se não, baixe em <strong>python.org/downloads</strong>.</p>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>2. Navegue até a pasta onde salvou o arquivo</strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">No Prompt de Comando:</p>
<div role="group" aria-label="Código" tabindex="0" class="relative group/copy bg-bg-000/50 border-0.5 border-border-400 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-accent-100"><div class="sticky opacity-0 group-hover/copy:opacity-100 group-focus-within/copy:opacity-100 top-2 py-2 h-12 w-0 float-right"><div class="absolute right-0 h-8 px-2 items-center inline-flex z-10"><button class="inline-flex

<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><em>(ajuste o caminho para onde está o arquivo <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">dashboard-grupo-scaini-sheets.html</code>)</em></p>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">

opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 data-find-omitted="" class="sr-only select-none">Claude respondeu: Instale a versão 3.</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Instale a versão <strong>3.12.x</strong> — é a mais estável e atual.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>Download direto:</strong><br>
👉 <strong>python.org/downloads</strong> — o botão amarelo grande já oferece a versão certa para o seu sistema.</p>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>Durante a instalação, atenção em uma etapa importante:</strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Na primeira tela do instalador, marque a caixa:</p>
<blockquote class="ml-2 border-l-4 border-[hsl(var(--border-300)/0.1)] pl-4 text-text-300">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">☑ <strong>Add Python to PATH</strong></p>
</blockquote>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Essa opção fica no rodapé da janela e precisa ser marcada <strong>antes</strong> de clicar em "Install Now". Se não marcar, o comando <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">python</code> não vai funcionar no terminal.</p>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Depois de instalar, feche e abra o terminal novamente e teste:</p>
<div role="group" aria-label="Código" tabindex="0" class="relative group/copy bg-bg-000/50 border-0.5 border-border-400 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-accent-100"><div class="sticky opacity-0 group-hover/copy:opacity-100 group-focus-within/copy:opacity-100 top-2 py-2 h-12 w-0 float-right"><div class="absolute right-0 h-8 px-2 items-center inline-flex z-10"><button class="inline-flex

  justify-center
  relative
  isolate
  shrink-0
  can-focus
  select-none
  disabled:pointer-events-none
  disabled:opacity-50
  disabled:shadow-none
  disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent

<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Deve aparecer <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Python 3.12.x</code>. Aí é só seguir os passos anteriores para subir o servidor. Me avisa quando estiver instalado!</p></div></div></div></div></div><div class="flex justify-start opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-within:opacity-100 pointer-coarse:opacity-100 transition" role="group" aria-label="Message actions"><div class="text-text-300"><div class="text-text-300 flex items-stretch justify-between"><button type="button" data-cds="Button" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus text-primary aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 !text-muted hover:!text-primary" aria-label="Copiar" data-testid="action-bar-copy" id="base-ui-_r_mn_"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish "></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 "><span class="relative"><span data-cds="Icon" class="transition-all opacity-100 scale-100" aria-hidden="true" style="font-family: var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable); Agora execute os passos abaixo:</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>1. Abra o Prompt de Comando</strong><br>
Pressione <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Windows + R</code>, digite <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">cmd</code> e pressione Enter.</p>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>2. Vá até a pasta do arquivo</strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Digite (ajuste para onde você salvou):</p>
<div role="group" aria-label="Código" tabindex="0" class="relative group/copy bg-bg-000/50 border-0.5 border-border-400 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-accent-100"><div class="sticky opacity-0 group-hover/copy:opacity-100 group-focus-within/copy:opacity-100 top-2 py-2 h-12 w-0 float-right"><div class="absolute right-0 h-8 px-2 items-center inline-flex z-10"><button class="inline-flex

<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>3. Suba o servidor</strong></p>

<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>Passo 1 — Abrir o Prompt de Comando</strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Pressione as teclas <strong>Windows + R</strong> ao mesmo tempo. Vai abrir uma janelinha pequena. Agora precisa que você me confirme:</p>
<ol class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-decimal flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">O repositório se chama <strong>scaini-dashboard</strong>?</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Já fez o <strong>upload do arquivo HTML</strong> e ativou o <strong>GitHub Pages</strong> (Settings → Pages → main → Save)?</li>
</ol>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Se sim, a URL do seu dashboard será:</p>

<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong><a class="underline underline underline-offset-2 decoration-1 decoration-current/40 hover:decoration-current focus:decoration-current" href="https://edvaldomhn-pixel.github.io/scaini-dashboard/dashboard-grupo-scaini-sheets.html">https://edvaldomhn-pixel.github.io/scaini-dashboard/dashboard-grupo-scaini-sheets.html</a></strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">O GitHub Pages pode demorar até 2 minutos para ativar na primeira vez. Se aparecer erro 404, aguarda 1 minuto e tenta novamente.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Me manda um print do que aparecer!</p></div></div></div></div></div><div class="flex justify-start opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-within:opacity-100 pointer-coarse:opacity-100 transition" role="group" aria-label="Message actions"><div class="text-text-300"><div class="text-text-300 flex items-stretch justify-between"><button type="button" data-cds="Button" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus text-primary aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 !text-muted hover:!text-primary" aria-label="Copiar" data-testid="action-bar-copy" id="base-ui-_r_qs_"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish "></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 "><span class="relative"><span data-cds="Icon" class="transition-all opacity-100 scale-100" aria-hidden="true" style="font-family: var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable); opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 data-find-omitted="" class="sr-only select-none">Claude respondeu: O arquivo está lá mas o nome não bate exato.</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">O arquivo está lá mas o nome não bate exato. Acesse seu repositório no GitHub:</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong><a class="underline underline underline-offset-2 decoration-1 decoration-current/40 hover:decoration-current focus:decoration-current" href="https://github.com/edvaldomhn-pixel/scaini-dashboard">https://github.com/edvaldomhn-pixel/scaini-dashboard</a></strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">E me diga: qual é o nome exato do arquivo que aparece listado lá? (pode ser que tenha ficado com nome diferente, ex: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">dashboard-grupo-scaini-sheets (1).html</code> ou similar)</p>

Vou recriar esse layout completo no seu arquivo.</p></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Check current file size and structure</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Check current file size and structure</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">O arquivo atual tem 1484 linhas. Agora vou reconstruir o arquivo completo com o novo visual:</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Executou 2 comandos, leu um arquivo</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Executou 2 comandos, leu um arquivo</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Novo arquivo <strong>dashboard-grupo-scaini-v2.html</strong> pronto! Faça o upload dele no GitHub no lugar do anterior.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">O que mudou no visual:</p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Tema escuro permanente</strong> igual ao print — fundo <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem] inline-flex items-center h-5"><span class="inline-block w-3 h-3 border-[0.5px] border-border-200 rounded-[4px] flex-shrink-0 shadow-sm mr-1 align-middle" style="background-color: rgb(11, 15, 26);"></span>#0B0F1A</code>, sidebar <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem] inline-flex items-center h-5"><span class="inline-block w-3 h-3 border-[0.5px] border-border-200 rounded-[4px] flex-shrink-0 shadow-sm mr-1 align-middle" style="background-color: rgb(17, 24, 39);"></span>#111827</code></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>KPI cards com gradiente</strong> em 6 cores (azul, teal, roxo, âmbar, vermelho, verde) com sparklines animadas dentro de cada card</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Header premium</strong> com busca, botão Exportar (gera CSV real), notificações e toggle de sidebar</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Filtros em pill-style</strong> — Empresa, Representante, Unidade/UF e Período (Ano + Trimestre + Mês) tudo na mesma barra</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Sidebar com seções</strong> — WORKSPACE, ANÁLISE, GESTÃO, SISTEMA — com os 9 itens do menu original</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Botão Exportar</strong> funcional — baixa os dados filtrados como CSV</li>
</ul>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Para atualizar no GitHub: acesse o repositório → clique no arquivo antigo → ícone de lápis (editar) ou simplesmente faça upload do novo arquivo.</p></div></div><div class="flex flex-col gap-2 py-2"><div class="group/artifact-block relative flex text-left font-ui rounded-lg overflow-hidden border-0.5 transition duration-300 w-full opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 data-find-omitted="" class="sr-only select-none">Claude respondeu: O visual está certo!</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">O visual está certo! O problema é que o app está mostrando "Aguardando login..." mesmo após o login — a tela de login some mas o conteúdo não carrega. Vou corrigir isso:</p></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Executou 3 comandos, leu um arquivo</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Executou 3 comandos, leu um arquivo</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Corrigido! O problema era que após o login o conteúdo não estava sendo renderizado. Agora:</p>
<ol class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-decimal flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Ao fazer login aparece imediatamente um <strong>spinner de carregamento</strong> no centro da tela</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Quando os dados da planilha chegam, o dashboard monta automaticamente com KPIs, gráficos e tabelas</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Se a planilha der erro de conexão, aparece a mensagem de erro com instrução</li>
</ol>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Faça o upload deste arquivo no GitHub substituindo o anterior — a URL permanece a mesma:</p>

O arquivo <strong><code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">dashboard-grupo-scaini-v2.html</code></strong> está lá. Mas o GitHub Pages precisa ser ativado neste repositório novo. Siga os passos:</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>1.</strong> Acesse: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">https://github.com/edvaldomhn-pixel/scaini-dashboard-/settings/pages</code></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>2.</strong> Em <strong>Source</strong> selecione <strong>Deploy from a branch</strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>3.</strong> Em <strong>Branch</strong> selecione <strong>main</strong> e clique em <strong>Save</strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>4.</strong> Aguarde 2 minutos e acesse:</p>

height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Pesquisou na web</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">O GitHub Pages ainda está propagando. Me manda um print do erro que aparece quando você abre a URL — assim identifico se é 404, erro de CORS ou outro problema.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Enquanto isso, confirme também: quando foi em <strong>Settings → Pages</strong>, apareceu uma mensagem verde dizendo <strong>"Your site is live at..."</strong>? Se não apareceu ainda, o Pages pode ainda não ter sido ativado corretamente.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">A URL correta para tentar é:</p>

opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 data-find-omitted="" class="sr-only select-none">Claude respondeu: O problema é claro — está mostrando "Aguardando login.</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">O problema é claro — está mostrando "Aguardando login..." mesmo depois de já estar logado. O app está pulando a tela de login mas o conteúdo não renderiza. Vou corrigir de vez:</p></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Executou 4 comandos</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Executou 4 comandos</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Encontrei o problema — há <strong>dois handlers de login</strong> conflitantes. O legado roda primeiro e quebra o fluxo. Vou remover o duplicado e corrigir de vez:</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Executou 6 comandos</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Executou 6 comandos</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">O handler está correto. Agora o problema é que o <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">loadData()</code> chama <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">processCSV</code> que chama <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">renderAll</code> (legado) que tenta achar <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">#chartReceita</code> mas ele não existe ainda. Vou garantir que <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">renderAll</code> e <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">renderPage</code> legados sejam neutralizados para não conflitar:</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Executou 6 comandos, leu um arquivo</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Executou 6 comandos, leu um arquivo</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Arquivo corrigido! O problema era que havia <strong>dois handlers de login conflitantes</strong> — o legado rodava primeiro e quebrava o fluxo antes do novo ter chance de executar.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>O que foi corrigido:</strong></p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Removido o handler de login duplicado do código legado</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Removido o listener duplicado do botão de senha</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Separada a função de parsing (<code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">processCSVRaw</code>) da de renderização</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Garantida a ordem correta: parsear → popular filtros → renderizar página → mostrar banner</li>
</ul>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>Agora faça:</strong></p>
<ol class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-decimal flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Acesse o repositório: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">https://github.com/edvaldomhn-pixel/scaini-dashboard-</code></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Clique no arquivo <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">dashboard-grupo-scaini-v2.html</code></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Clique no ícone de lápis (editar) → apague tudo → cole o conteúdo do novo arquivo</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Ou use <strong>Add file → Upload files</strong> para substituir</li>
</ol>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">A URL do dashboard continua:</p>

Reescrito do zero, sem nenhum código legado conflitante.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>Agora faça o upload no GitHub:</strong></p>
<ol class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-decimal flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Acesse: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">https://github.com/edvaldomhn-pixel/scaini-dashboard-</code></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Clique em <strong>Add file → Upload files</strong></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Arraste o arquivo <strong>dashboard-scaini-final.html</strong></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Clique em <strong>Commit changes</strong></li>
</ol>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">A URL para acessar será:</p>
<div role="group" aria-label="Código" tabindex="0" class="relative group/copy bg-bg-000/50 border-0.5 border-border-400 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-accent-100"><div class="sticky opacity-0 group-hover/copy:opacity-100 group-focus-within/copy:opacity-100 top-2 py-2 h-12 w-0 float-right"><div class="absolute right-0 h-8 px-2 items-center inline-flex z-10"><button class="inline-flex

<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>O que foi corrigido nesta versão:</strong></p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Zero código duplicado — um único handler de login, um único fluxo de dados</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Login funciona com <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">onsubmit</code> direto no form — sem addEventListener conflitante</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Ao logar aparece spinner imediato, depois carrega a planilha</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Filtros com <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">onchange</code> inline — sem listeners duplicados</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Navegação lateral conectada a páginas reais: Executivo, Empresas, Representantes, Clientes, e placeholders para os demais</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Todos os 13 itens do menu incluindo Conferência e Sincronização</li>
</ul>

opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 data-find-omitted="" class="sr-only select-none">Claude respondeu: Vou criar o arquivo de uma forma diferente que funcione melhor no Chrome: Na verdade, a melhor solução é subir o arquivo diretamente para o GitHub pelo navegad…</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Vou criar o arquivo de uma forma diferente que funcione melhor no Chrome:</p></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Creating download helper page that embeds the dashboard as a downloadable link</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Creating download helper page that embeds the dashboard as a downloadable link</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Na verdade, a melhor solução é subir o arquivo diretamente para o GitHub pelo navegador — sem precisar baixar. Faça assim:</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>1.</strong> Acesse: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">https://github.com/edvaldomhn-pixel/scaini-dashboard-/upload</code></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>2.</strong> Vai abrir a tela de upload do GitHub</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>3.</strong> Clique no link <strong>"choose your files"</strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>4.</strong> Aí o Chrome vai abrir o explorador de arquivos — procure em <strong>Downloads</strong> pelo arquivo <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">dashboard-scaini-final.html</code></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Se não encontrar em Downloads, tente:</p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Abrir o Claude no navegador</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Clicar no card cinza <strong>dashboard-scaini-final</strong> que aparece no chat</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Na prévia que abrir, pressionar <strong>Ctrl + S</strong> para salvar a página</li>
</ul>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Me diz se consegue ver o card cinza com o arquivo no chat — o problema pode ser só em como o download está sendo iniciado.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="flex justify-start opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-within:opacity-100 pointer-coarse:opacity-100 transition" role="group" aria-label="Message actions"><div class="text-text-300"><div class="text-text-300 flex items-stretch justify-between"><button type="button" data-cds="Button" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus text-primary aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 !text-muted hover:!text-primary" aria-label="Copiar" data-testid="action-bar-copy" id="base-ui-_r_12b_"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish "></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 "><span class="relative"><span data-cds="Icon" class="transition-all opacity-100 scale-100" aria-hidden="true" style="font-family: var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable); opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 data-find-omitted="" class="sr-only select-none">Claude respondeu: Perfeito!</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Perfeito! Esse é o arquivo certo — o Chrome salvou com o nome da conversa. Faça assim:</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>No GitHub, após o upload:</strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">A URL para acessar será com o nome exato do arquivo. Me confirma: o arquivo já aparece listado no repositório <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">scaini-dashboard-</code>?</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Se sim, a URL será:</p>
<div role="group" aria-label="Código" tabindex="0" class="relative group/copy bg-bg-000/50 border-0.5 border-border-400 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-accent-100"><div class="sticky opacity-0 group-hover/copy:opacity-100 group-focus-within/copy:opacity-100 top-2 py-2 h-12 w-0 float-right"><div class="absolute right-0 h-8 px-2 items-center inline-flex z-10"><button class="inline-flex

<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Mas esse nome com espaços pode causar problema na URL. O ideal é <strong>renomear o arquivo no GitHub</strong>:</p>
<ol class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-decimal flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Clique no arquivo dentro do repositório</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Clique no ícone de <strong>lápis</strong> (editar)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">No topo da página, onde aparece o nome do arquivo, apague e escreva:</li>
</ol>
<div role="group" aria-label="Código" tabindex="0" class="relative group/copy bg-bg-000/50 border-0.5 border-border-400 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-accent-100"><div class="sticky opacity-0 group-hover/copy:opacity-100 group-focus-within/copy:opacity-100 top-2 py-2 h-12 w-0 float-right"><div class="absolute right-0 h-8 px-2 items-center inline-flex z-10"><button class="inline-flex

opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 data-find-omitted="" class="sr-only select-none">Claude respondeu: Entendi o problema!</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Entendi o problema! O Chrome salvou a <strong>página do Claude</strong> em vez do arquivo HTML do dashboard. O conteúdo está errado — são 1309 linhas do site do Claude, não do dashboard.</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Preciso que você faça diferente. Vou gerar o arquivo correto direto no GitHub usando o editor deles:</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>1.</strong> Clique no arquivo <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">dashboard-scaini-final.html</code> no repositório</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>2.</strong> Clique no ícone de <strong>lápis</strong> (editar) no canto superior direito</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>3.</strong> Selecione <strong>todo o conteúdo</strong> (Ctrl+A) e <strong>delete tudo</strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>4.</strong> Agora copie o conteúdo correto daqui:</p></div></div><div class="mt-4"><div class="grid grid-rows-[auto_auto] min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0"><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"><div class="min-w-0 pl-2 py-1.5"><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><button class="group/status flex items-center gap-2 py-1 text-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left text-text-500 hover:text-text-300 flex-1 min-w-0" aria-expanded="false"><div class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 min-w-0" style="opacity: 1;"><span class="truncate font-base">Check file size</span><span class="inline-flex transition-transform duration-200 shrink-0 -rotate-90"><div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" style="flex-shrink: 0;"><path d="M14.128 7.165a.502.502 0 0 1 .744.67l-4.5 5-.078.07a.5.5 0 0 1-.666-.07l-4.5-5-.06-.082a.501.501 0 0 1 .729-.656l.075.068L10 11.752z"></path></svg></div></span></div></button></div><span class="sr-only" role="status" aria-live="polite">Check file size</span><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" style="grid-template-rows: 0fr;"><div class="overflow-hidden min-w-0"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="row-start-2 col-start-1 relative grid isolate min-w-0"><div class="row-start-1 col-start-1 relative z-[2] min-w-0"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">O arquivo tem 64KB — grande demais para colar manualmente. A melhor solução é outra:</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>Use o GitHub Desktop</strong> — é um programa gratuito que facilita muito:</p>
<ol class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-decimal flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Baixe em: <strong>desktop.github.com</strong></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Instale e faça login com sua conta GitHub</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Clone o repositório <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">scaini-dashboard-</code></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Substitua o arquivo <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">dashboard-scaini-final.html</code> na pasta do repositório pelo arquivo correto</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Clique em <strong>Commit to main</strong> e depois <strong>Push origin</strong></li>
</ol>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>OU</strong>, posso hospedar o dashboard de outra forma. Você tem acesso a algum desses serviços?</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div data-find-omitted="" class="contents"></div></div></div></div><div class="flex justify-start opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-within:opacity-100 pointer-coarse:opacity-100 transition" role="group" aria-label="Message actions"><div class="text-text-300"><div class="text-text-300 flex items-stretch justify-between"><button type="button" data-cds="Button" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none cursor-[var(--cds-cursor-interactive)] aria-disabled:cursor-default data-[disabled]:cursor-default border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus text-primary aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 !text-muted hover:!text-primary" aria-label="Copiar" data-testid="action-bar-copy" id="base-ui-_r_1c4_"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish "></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 "><span class="relative"><span data-cds="Icon" class="transition-all opacity-100 scale-100" aria-hidden="true" style="font-family: var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable); opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 data-find-omitted="" class="sr-only select-none">Claude respondeu: Ótimo!</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Ótimo! Siga o passo a passo:</p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>1. Baixe e instale o GitHub Desktop</strong><br>
Acesse <strong>desktop.github.com</strong> e clique em <strong>Download for Windows</strong>.</p>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>2. Faça login</strong><br>
Abra o GitHub Desktop → <strong>File → Options → Accounts → Sign in to GitHub.com</strong> → entre com seu usuário <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">edvaldomhn-pixel</code>.</p>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>3. Clone o repositório</strong></p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Clique em <strong>File → Clone Repository</strong></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Selecione <strong>edvaldomhn-pixel/scaini-dashboard-</strong></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Escolha uma pasta no seu computador (ex: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Documentos</code>)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Clique em <strong>Clone</strong></li>
</ul>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>4. Substitua o arquivo</strong></p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Abra a pasta onde clonou (ex: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Documentos/scaini-dashboard-</code>)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Apague o arquivo <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">dashboard-scaini-final.html</code> que está lá</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Agora precisa colocar o arquivo correto nessa pasta</li>
</ul>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Para pegar o arquivo correto, no <strong>Claude</strong> clique no card cinza <strong>dashboard-scaini-final</strong> que aparece mais acima nessa conversa → na prévia que abrir pressione <strong>Ctrl+S</strong> → salve como <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">dashboard-scaini-final.html</code> na pasta do repositório clonado.</p>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>5. Publique</strong><br>
No GitHub Desktop vai aparecer o arquivo alterado. Escreva qualquer mensagem no campo <strong>Summary</strong> (ex: "dashboard atualizado") e clique em:</p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Commit to main</strong></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Push origin</strong></li>
</ul>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Após o push, aguarde 2 minutos e acesse:</p>
<div role="group" aria-label="Código" tabindex="0" class="relative group/copy bg-bg-000/50 border-0.5 border-border-400 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-accent-100"><div class="sticky opacity-0 group-hover/copy:opacity-100 group-focus-within/copy:opacity-100 top-2 py-2 h-12 w-0 float-right"><div class="absolute right-0 h-8 px-2 items-center inline-flex z-10"><button class="inline-flex
